name: Linguine with Olives and Sun-Dried Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Sun-dried Tomatoes, Oil-packed -- Drained and Chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot of boiling, salted water, cook Linguine for 8 to 10 minutes or until tender but firm; drain well.
2. Meanwhile, heat half of the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
3. Add minced garlic and hot pepper flakes, cooking for 3 to 4 minutes or until fragrant but not browned.
4. Stir in chopped ripe tomatoes, olives, sun-dried tomatoes (drained), salt, and pepper.
5. Cook for 2 to 3 minutes or until heated through.
6. Add the cooked Linguine, remaining olive oil, and fresh basil; toss well.
7. Serve topped with crumbled feta cheese, if desired.
